name: gost-standardizer
description: Local MCP plugin for inspecting and standardizing DOCX documents to GOST-style formatting.

interface.shortDescription: Turn messy Word files into GOST-style documents.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP plugin that inspects DOCX files, applies Russian GOST-inspired layout rules, and exports a cleaned-up .docx with consistent typography and page setup.
defaultPrompt: Standardize this Word document to GOST style
Inspect this DOCX for formatting problems
